channel.title: neovim on Ayham's Online Website
channel.description: Recent content in neovim on Ayham's Online Website

item.title: Brackets Heaven in Neovim
item.description: Lately I have been writing alot of flutter. And there is one charecteristic ‘annoyance’ with that, BRACKETS. The flutter meta is having class constructors that enclose other classes to form a Widget tree. Since initializing those Widgets is done with class Constructors, you end up with this abomination: Ofcourse, this is Neovim we are talking about, and there is always a way to make your life easier with plugins.
